steps.title: Find the two angle measures
steps.content:
A transversal through parallel lines creates two angle measures that are supplementary. If one measure is $(6x-210)^\circ$, the other is
$$180-(6x-210)=390-6x$$

steps.title: List possible four-angle sums
steps.content:
A sum of four angles can use $0$, $1$, $2$, $3$, or $4$ copies of $(6x-210)^\circ$. The possible sums are
$$1560-24x$$
$$960-12x$$
$$360$$
$$12x-240$$
$$24x-840$$

steps.title: Compare with the choices
steps.content: The expression $-12x+1{,}260$ is not in the possible-sum list. The answer is A.
